About

We Help You Planning Your Journey

Welcome to DuneTrek Tours, your trusted guide to discovering the unparalleled beauty and rich culture of Morocco. From the majestic Atlas Mountains to the serene coasts, and the vibrant souks to the golden deserts, let us craft your perfect Moroccan adventure.

Meet The Team

Ismail
CEO

  •   Varázslatos Marokkó  - Fantasztikus élmény volt egy napot eltölteni Essaouirában a DuneTrekTours szervezésével. Ismail a tulajdonos, nagyon kedves és figyelmes volt, mindenről gondoskodott. Gyorsan válaszolt az üzeneteimre és minden kérésemre odafigyelt. Nagyszerű szervezés.... read more Korán reggel indultunk Marrakeshből, útközben többször megálltunk, megcsodálni a tájat, az argán fákat és a rajtuk ácsorgó kecskéket. Hihetetlen élmény. Most már értem, hogy Ismailnek miért a kecske a kedvenc állata ????. Essaouira egyszerűen lenyűgözött. Különleges kék színű csónakjai, az óceánpart, a kikötő, a halpiac, a belváros .olyan élmény amit mindenkinek látni kell. Ismail nagyszerű idegenvezető, figyelmes és mindent megtett, hogy megmutassa a város igazi arcát, a helyiek mindennapjait. Köszönöm, hogy részese lehettem ennek az élménynek.
    Köszönöm Ismail!

    Flyer795472
    February 7, 2025

      Magical days in Marrakech with dune trek tours  - Amazing Private Tour with DuneTrek Tours!
    We had an unforgettable private tour organized by DuneTrek Tours, and everything exceeded our expectations. The owner, Ismail, was incredibly kind, professional, and attentive,... read more making the whole experience seamless.
    Our English-speaking guide was fantastic—very knowledgeable and friendly. We visited Bahia Palace, the vibrant souks, the historic Ben Youssef Madrasa, and the lively Jmaa El-Fna square. Every stop was well-planned, and we felt truly immersed in Moroccan culture.
    We highly recommend DuneTrek Tours for anyone visiting Morocco. The service, hospitality, and attention to detail were outstanding. Thank you, Ismail, for an amazing experience

    Rianna w
    January 18, 2025

      Ismail is the best  - Ismail is the best guide you can have in Marroco! Frienfly, open to share his knowledge and with a great network of contacts.
    He helped me getting a taxi to... read more travel through Marroco with a great driver and a fantastic price.
    I highly recommend his services

    Eduardo A
    February 5, 2025

      Dunes with mum - I went to the dunes with my mum and we had the best experience ever. The fire show was blowing! And I do love most the sunset.

    Paola C
    February 10, 2025

  •   Magical trip în Atlas Mountains with Dune Trek Tours  - I had the most incredible experience with DuneTrek Tours on our trip to the Imlil Atlas Mountains! From start to finish, everything was perfectly organized. The journey was seamless, and... read more our driver, Khalid, was fantastic—he made the ride comfortable and enjoyable. The views of the mountains were absolutely breathtaking, and the experience truly felt magical. Ismail, the owner, did an outstanding job coordinating every detail, ensuring everything went smoothly. I can’t recommend DuneTrek enough for anyone looking for a top-notch, well-organized adventure. You won't be disappointed!

    lechintan r
    January 26, 2025

      A magical trip to Essaouira with Dune Trek Tours  - Our 2-night getaway to Essaouira was an unforgettable experience, thanks to DuneTrek Tours and the amazing Ismail, who was our driver and guide throughout the journey.

    From the moment... read more we were picked up in Marrakech, Ismail ensured that everything was perfect. He is not only a skilled and safe driver but also incredibly friendly and knowledgeable about the region. The drive to Essaouira was smooth and filled with fascinating insights into Moroccan culture and history.

    Essaouira itself was a dream. We enjoyed serene yoga sessions by the beach and thrilling surfing lessons tailored to our skill levels. Everything was organized seamlessly by DuneTrek Tours, making the experience stress-free and truly magical.

    Ismail’s warm hospitality and attention to detail made this trip one of the best we’ve ever had. We highly recommend DuneTrek Tours for anyone looking to explore Morocco in comfort and style. Thank you, Ismail, for an incredible journey!

    MariaJC1969-
    December 29, 2024
